MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vanessa K. Wills, Esq., of the Dolan Law Firm, Tel. 415.421.2800, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

No other appearance. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: DEFENDANT FAHIM SHAFIK's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar. The parties stipulated that the plaintiff may file a Second Amended Complaint in the form attached to the order. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
